name: Ayush Munot

paragraphs: I am a Junior AI Researcher at Domyn. I am interested in representation learning, retrieval, LLMs, and AI agents. I graduated from IIT Kharagpur, India, with an Integrated Master's Degree (B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering and M.Tech in Financial Engineering), along with a Minor in Computer Science and a Micro-Specialization in AI.

My work focuses on building and evaluating intelligent systems. I have worked on retrieval and code intelligence at Sourcegraph, financial AI at Fidelity Investments, and human-centered AI research at the University of Cambridge and IISc Bangalore. I am a core contributor to MTEB (Massive Text Embedding Benchmark), with a particular interest in evaluation, reasoning, post-training, and scalable AI systems.

footerNote: Personal site — content sourced from CV and project repos.
